heading: Availability of collected customs duties for expenditures as Legislature may provide
label: 1642a Availability of collected customs duties for expenditures as Legislature may provide
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the proceeds of customs duties collected in the Virgin Islands less the cost of collecting all said duties shall, effective for fiscal years beginning after , be covered into the Treasury of the Virgin Islands, and shall be available for expenditure as the Legislator of the Virgin Islands may provide.September 30, 19791So in original. Probably should be “Legislature”.1
